positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized celestial forest scene. Giant bioluminescent mushrooms and exotic glowing flora fill the frame, creating an otherworldly, magical atmosphere. A central, elegant silhouette of a majestic woodland creature (like a stylized stag or fox) stands amidst the glowing undergrowth. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant teal, and luminous violet, contrasted by brilliant emerald highlights. Focus on strong, clean lines and minimal gradients suitable for screen printing or vinyl transfer. Art style should be a blend of Art Nouveau botanical illustration and modern graphic design. Flat color fields with controlled glowing edges. Composition is central and highly detailed, designed to wrap around a garment.
negative: low detail, blurry, messy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, poor composition, gradient spill, realistic photography, photo, drawing, sketch
